text:
VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: These are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS variable called CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to 
'2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' (Other Services claim). The corresponding 
payment information for these claims is in the MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_SPEND field.
